roa.docketEntryComment: BOND CLERK'S REQUEST TO ADDRESS/EXONERATE BOND#00015331 AT 071615 HRG
DEFT'S PC849,5 MOTION TO DEEM ARREST A DETENTION FILED

/CAL:DEFENSE'S PC849,5 AND PC851,6 MOTION (ARR DATE 062115); & ADDRESS TO EXONERATE BOND #00015331/BE/X:PC851,6 MOTION IS DENIED/MO GRTD/X:MOTIONIS GRANTED AS TO PC849,5 ONLY/CTORD: THE PETITIONER'S RECORD OF THE ARRESTBY THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SHOW THIS WAS NOT AN ARREST BUT A DETENTION ONLY/X: ORDER DECLARING THE MATTER A DETENTION ONLY SIGNED AND FILED/
